vs_duel_rankings.overview: VS Duel lasts 4 weeks. Your wins and losses define your rank among 16 alliances. Depending on rank you can promote to a higher league, stay, or be demoted.

promotion_demotion.promotion_zone: Ranks 1-2 - usually selected for promotion to higher league. Win as many weeks as possible.
promotion_demotion.safe_zone: Ranks 3-11 approximately - 2 or more wins keeps you in same league
promotion_demotion.demotion_zone: Rank 12 and lower - at risk of demotion. A single win does NOT get you out of danger zone.
promotion_demotion.note: Actual promotion/demotion ranges vary and are defined during each VS Duel cycle

strategic_tips: For promotion: aim for rank 1-2 by winning as many weeks as possible
To stay safe: 2+ wins guaranteed - best patterns are W-L-W-L (rank 7) or L-W-L-W (rank 10)
These alternating patterns let you save resources on loss weeks while still staying safe
Demotion risk: rank 12+ - a single win is not enough to escape demotion zone
Plan your strongest attack weeks when you need wins, conserve on planned loss weeks
Wednesday Valor Badge from VS Duel is critical for Versus Duel research tree - never skip
vs_duel_rankings.daily_rewards_note: See alliance_duel_schedule.json for full daily reward breakdown by day of week
